correctness_properties.invariant: load then save produces identical files
correctness_properties.title: Round-trip idempotency

steps.action: read and parse all four files

introduction: This is a golden fixture spec for testing the afspec library.

acceptance_criteria.action: load the spec and return a populated Spec struct

edge_cases.action: return an error listing the missing files
edge_cases.error_condition: one or more required files are absent

user_story.benefit: inspect and operate on spec data programmatically
user_story.goal: load a spec folder from disk into memory
